text.title: api-first-development Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-first-development as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Modifying generated code to deviate from the spec, then not regenerating when the spec changes. The spec and implementation silently diverge.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generated code that diverges from the spec makes the spec a lie. Add a hash of the spec file as a comment in generated files; if the spec changes, the hash mismatch signals that regeneration is required.
